headline: Adobe Leans On Semrush Deal And Buybacks As Shares Stay Weak
summary: Adobe agreed to acquire Semrush in a cash and stock deal valued at about $1.9b. The company also authorized a new multi year $25b stock repurchase program. Both moves were announced while Adobe continues its CEO succession process. Adobe, NasdaqGS:ADBE, is taking these steps with the stock at $251.44 and a value_score of 5, following a period where the share price has fallen 24.6% year to date and 39.7% over the past year. Returns over 3 and 5 years are also negative, down 44.6% and 53.5%...
